subcodes.first_line: O my God, Thou art sanctified above all my praise, and I cannot encompass Thy glorification. Thou art exalted, O my Heart's Desire, and I find no pathway unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تقدست یا الهی عن کل ثنائی و لا احصی ثنا علیک و تنزهت یا مقصودی و لا اجد سبیلا الیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
